profile.name: Daniel
profile.bio: Product Manager, Musician, and Builder. Constructing human-centric software and creative workflows.

projects.title: The Retro Circuit
projects.description: A specialized comparison engine for retro gaming hardware. Built with Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS, following a Swiss Industrial design philosophy.

projects.title: Setlists MD
projects.description: A focused workspace for organizing setlists and musical ideas using Markdown. Streamlining the workflow for musicians and performers.

projects.title: RedLine Running
projects.description: A high-performance running application built to track and analyze athletic performance with precision.

read.title: From the Editorial Page of the Falchester Weekly Review
read.author: Marie Brennan

read.title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck

logbook.title: On Minimalism in Interface Design
logbook.excerpt: Exploring the boundaries of whitespace and typography in modern web applications. Why less often translates to a more focused user experience.

logbook.title: The Swiss Industrial Philosophy
logbook.excerpt: Applying principles from classic Swiss design to component-based architectures. A look at grids, stark contrasts, and functional aesthetics.

logbook.title: Building Reliable Workflows
logbook.excerpt: How to structure digital environments that adapt to creative processes rather than constraining them.
